# Tamir.li (תמיר לי)

> Hebrew-first online file conversion for Israel. Images, video, audio, documents — drag, pick format, download.

## Site
- https://tamir.li
- Sitemap: https://tamir.li/sitemap.xml
- Languages: he (default), en, es, ru, de, fr, it

## What we do
- Free tier: up to 5 conversions/day
- Premium: unlimited conversions, no ads (Stripe)
- Files processed securely; not stored after conversion

## Popular tools
- /jpg-to-png — Convert JPG to PNG
- /png-to-jpg — Convert PNG to JPG
- /pdf-to-docx — PDF to Word
- /docx-to-pdf — Word to PDF
- /mp3-to-wav — MP3 to WAV
- /image-compressor — Compress images
- /merge-pdf — PDF manager (merge, reorder, rotate)

## Legal
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service
- /about — About Tamir.li
- /contact — Contact

## For crawlers
- Prefer canonical URLs without locale prefix for Hebrew (default)
- Locale URLs: /en/, /es/, /ru/, /de/, /fr/, /it/
